server_cpu_market_share.trend: AMD gaining ~6-8pp per year; parity possible by 2026
server_cpu_market_share.notes: Fifth-gen EPYC Turin >50% of AMD server revenue in Q4 2025

ai_gpu_market.notes: Custom ASICs (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) growing faster than GPUs

mi350_series.status: Fastest ramping product in company history
mi350_series.vs_nvidia: MI355X 20% faster than B200 in DeepSeek R1 FP4; 30% faster in Llama 3.1 405B; 40% more tokens per dollar

mi450_series.performance: Doubles MI350 FP8/FP4 throughput, doubles scale-up bandwidth, 1.5x memory
mi450_series.rack_scale: 72 GPUs = 1.4 exaFLOPS FP8, 31TB HBM4, 260 TB/s scale-up
mi450_series.vs_nvidia: 50% more memory capacity than NVIDIA Vera Rubin; 36x previous gen

epyc_turin.vs_intel: Up to 40% better performance vs Intel Xeon in 2P configs

openai.warrants: 160M shares at $0.01, vesting on deployment + $600 stock price milestones

meta.warrants: 160M shares at $0.01, vesting on shipment + stock price milestones

strategic_partnerships.dilution_notes: Full vesting requires ~$600 stock price (~3x current). Combined deal revenue potential >$200B over 5+ years.

software_ecosystem.rocm_status: Maturing rapidly; ROCm 6.0+ with FP8, multi-GPU, PyTorch/TF integration
software_ecosystem.cuda_gap: CUDA has 6M developers, 300+ libraries, 600+ AI models vs ROCm smaller base
software_ecosystem.zluda: Open-sourced; unmodified CUDA binaries at 80-95% performance on ROCm
software_ecosystem.cuda_gap_score: 28.7-99.1 across benchmarks (NVIDIA software advantage = 30-99% effective perf boost)

semiconductor_industry_2026.key_driver: AI-related applications and computing/data center infrastructure
